sources.name: arXiv AI Papers

sources.name: EFF Digital Rights
sources.notes: Electronic Frontier Foundation — digital rights, AI surveillance, privacy, cyber law. TIER1: original reporting and legal analysis. Best source for rights-contracting tech deployments. LR-014(E) compliant.

sources.name: Wired Magazine
sources.notes: Wired — geopolitical tech coverage: AI chips, semiconductor wars, surveillance, cyber warfare, export controls. TIER2: analytical depth. LR-014(E) compliant.

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.notes: Ars Technica — deep tech analysis, AI, security, infrastructure. TIER2: specialist depth. LR-014(E) compliant.

sources.name: IEEE Spectrum
sources.notes: IEEE Spectrum — semiconductor engineering, AI hardware, critical infrastructure tech. TIER2: engineering specialist. Only source for semiconductor/chip-level intelligence. LR-014(E) compliant.
